features: TALC-FREE FORMULA: Both body powders are 100% talc-free, offering a gentle and safe solution for daily body care needs
DUAL FRAGRANCES: Set includes two delightful scents - Fresh Cherry Blossom and Fresh Water Lily - providing options for different moods and preferences
MOISTURE CONTROL: Effectively absorbs excess moisture to keep skin dry and comfortable throughout the day
ANTI-CHAFING PROTECTION: Helps prevent skin irritation and chafing, making it ideal for daily use and physical activities
CONVENIENT PACKAGING: Each bottle features an easy-to-use design with clear labelling and decorative floral patterns
description: Product Description Experience luxurious comfort with this Nuage Body Powder set featuring two delightful fragrances - Fresh Cherry Blossom and Fresh Water Lily. Each 280g bottle is completely talc-free, making it gentle and safe for daily use. The finely-milled powder effectively absorbs moisture and helps prevent chafing, keeping you comfortable throughout the day. The Water Lily variant offers a serene aquatic scent, while the Cherry Blossom provides a sweet, floral fragrance that's both refreshing and elegant. The thoughtfully designed bottles feature beautiful floral illustrations and convenient dispensing systems for easy application. Perfect for use after bathing or during warm weather, these powders leave your skin feeling silky-smooth and fresh. The gentle formula is suitable for all skin types, making it an essential addition to your daily body care routine. The elegant packaging not only serves its practical purpose but also adds a touch of sophistication to your dressing table. Directions Apply to body after bathing or during warm weather. For daily use. Avoid contact with eyes and broken skin. Keep out of reach of children. Safety Warning Avoid contact with eyes. Keep out of reach of children. For external use only. See more
